Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The problem is about analyzing an event log for a Customer Support Ticket Resolution process to find delays

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The cases with significantly longer resolution times are 102 104 and 105 Case 105 stands out as the longest at nearly 49 hours followed by 102 at about 25 hours and 104 at around 24 hours compared to the much quicker 101 and 103 cases

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Looking at 102 the escalation to Level 2 at 1130 on March 1 seems to have caused a bottleneck with a 25 hour wait before the Level 2 investigation started at 1400

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Then the resolution happened the next day at 0900 which might indicate that the 19 hour gap between investigation and resolution was due to overnight processing or delays in finalizing the resolution

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 104 despite no escalation shows a 35 hour wait after assignment before investigation at 1300 and again the resolution is delayed until the next day at 0800
